hook.text: CR7 HUNTS WORLD CUP HISTORY TONIGHT

beats.text: HE COULD BE FIRST TO SCORE AT SIX WORLD CUPS
HE ALSO CLOSES IN ON MESSI'S WC APPEARANCES RECORD
TONIGHT PORTUGAL FACE TUANZEBE'S DR CONGO IN HOUSTON

caption: He came through Old Trafford, he became a legend — and tonight Cristiano Ronaldo gets another shot at World Cup immortality 🔴 Playing for Portugal against DR Congo in Houston this evening, CR7 can become the FIRST player ever to score at SIX different World Cups — extending his own record. And for added United flavour: Axel Tuanzebe, who came through our academy, starts for DR Congo. Two United connections on the same pitch. Who scores tonight — Ronaldo or Tuanzebe? 👇 #mufc #manutd #premierleague #football #worldcup #ronaldo #portugal #cr7
